scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run seed && node src/index.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
